79333847.title: Leadership approval opinion polling for the next United Kingdom general election
79333847.extract: At various dates in the run up to the next United Kingdom general election various organisations have carried out opinion polling to gauge the opinions that voters hold towards political leaders. Most of the polling companies listed are members of the British Polling Council (BPC) and abide by its disclosure rules. The dates of the polls range from the 2024 UK general election on 4 July to the present.
